contribution.title: General relativity
contribution.description: Geometric theory of gravitation in which mass-energy curves spacetime. The Einstein field equations relate the Einstein tensor to the stress-energy tensor.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: The entire physics layer of this project sits on top of Einstein's field equations.

contribution.title: Equivalence principle
contribution.description: Local equivalence of gravitation and acceleration; foundational for the geometric interpretation of gravity.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Drives the choice of coordinate systems and freely falling observers in the integrator.

reasoning_lens.proof_standard: Thought experiments grounded in invariance principles; equations follow the geometry.
reasoning_lens.favorite_question: What is the simplest universal principle that this phenomenon obeys?
What does a freely falling observer see?
How is the physics expressed in coordinate-independent terms?
reasoning_lens.failure_mode: Letting an elegant idea outrun observational checks (Einstein's cosmological constant flip-flop, his resistance to indeterministic quantum mechanics).

reference.citation: Einstein, A. (1915). The field equations of gravitation. Sitzungsberichte der Preussischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 844-847.

how_to_apply.when_to_consult: Reviewing whether a proposed change respects general covariance, equivalence, and the structure of the field equations.
how_to_apply.cautions: Beauty is a strong heuristic but not a substitute for testable predictions. Tag elegant unverified ideas as speculative_extension.
